title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at DMart

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at DMart
jsonLd.description:
DMart invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Patna location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DMart:
DMart is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DMart!
